explanation: The user asks to go to the potato that is inside a cabinet. Currently, the robot is holding potato_0, and the cabinet (cabinet_0) is already open and contains potato_1. The robot needs to navigate to the cabinet, open it (if not already open), and locate the specific potato (potato_1) inside. Since the user refers to a known object (potato_1) in the discussed_objects, we use its ID. The plan starts with moving to the cabinet, opening it, and then finding the potato inside. No pick-up is required as the user only wants to go to the potato, not to pick it up.
